session_summary:
## Phase 2 — 6 Lanes Complete: Desktop Feature Parity

This session completed the remaining 6 lanes of Phase 2 desktop feature parity in a fully parallel wave model:

### Completed Lanes (6)

1. **Command Palette Expansion** — New DialogCommandPalette component with fuzzysort search + keyboard navigation. showPalette() now opens palette dialog instead of file dialog. 2 i18n keys.

2. **Subagent Delegation UI** — @general mentions in desktop composer. Added 'delegate' discriminent to AtOption type. Subagent mode agents render with distinct share icon. handleAtSelect, groupBy, atKey updated. Delegates reuse agent ContentPart pipeline.

3. **Session Search + Filter** — Fuzzy search via fuzzysort on title+projectName. 200ms debounce. Agent filter and model filter via MenuV2.RadioGroup. Existing TimeFilter work i18n-ified. fullRecords split fixes dropdown truncation. 9 i18n keys in en.ts and zh.ts.

4. **Plugin Management UI** — BLOCKER fix: IPC handler for get/set-desktop-plugin-config was missing (plugins silently failed to load). DialogManagePlugins (CRUD list) + DialogInstallPlugin (npm/file forms). PluginKind includes 'desktop'. 13 tests. 21 i18n keys. Structured data-loss logging.

5. **GitHub Integration + PR Management** — parseGitHubRemote revived. PKCE OAuth flow with safeStorage encryption. Octokit Effect service layer (createPullRequest, getPullRequestStatus, listPullRequests). PR creation UI in review-tab. IPC proxy with URL allowlist. 14 i18n keys.

6. **Export/Import Sessions** — ExportedSession Effect Schema with sanitization. POST /session/import endpoint with HTTP 400 error mapping. importCreate bypasses InstanceState.context. Export/Import dialogs using usePlatform() bridge. 23 i18n keys across all 18 locale files.

### Key Metrics
- **6 plan artifacts** created (1-3 revisions each)
- **6 cartography artifacts** created and curated
- **14 critic reviews** processed across all lanes
- **8 repair cycles** completed (github: 2, plugin: 4, export: 3, search: 4)
- **63+ files changed**, 3 new packages/directories
- **6 commits** pushed to dev (1abce7801..aae417b47)
- **6 checkpoint publications** registered

### Deferred Seams Documented
- Message-content sanitization (export v2)
- ZIP compression for exports
- Plugin-contributed command registration
- CI/CD polling strategy for PR status
- safeStorage fallback handling
- 15 non-EN locale files for github.* and plugin.* keys
next_steps:
1. File follow-up issues for the deferred seams documented in each lane's publication record
2. Integrate the produce_fragment consolidator for shared files (ipc.ts, en.ts, preload) 
3. Phase 3 scoping: desktop remaining items (settings polish, agent config, remaining audit items)
4. Review stress-test findings across all lanes (Tab trapping, pendingOAuth eviction, plugin-loader cache invalidation, partial import rollback)

findings.summary: Phase 2 has 6 independent lanes to complete. All lanes touch different files. Zero contention except i18n/en.ts and ipc.ts shared files use produce_fragment.
MCP dialog-select-mcp.tsx is the reference CRUD pattern for plugin UI. Uses window.api pattern, electron-store, Dialog from @opencode-ai/ui/dialog.
home.tsx has existing dirty TimeFilter work-in-progress. Search/filter state, TimeFilter type, filtered records memo already started.
prompt-input.tsx (2155 lines) has full @mention system with AtOption, SlashCommand, PromptPopover. ComposerPicker, ComposerAgentControl exist for agent display.
command.tsx (438 lines) has full useCommand system with Keybind, CommandOption, CommandCatalogItem, showPalette. 27 useCommand call sites across 14 files.
store.ts uses electron-store with getStore(name). IPC handlers in ipc.ts follow registerIpcHandlers(deps) pattern with window.api bridge.
Plugin Management UI cartography complete. 6 smoking guns found including BLOCKER dangling IPC channel. DesktopPluginProvider/DesktopPluginLoader exist but no management UI.
Shared file strategy: ipc.ts, preload/types.ts, preload/index.ts use produce_fragment. Only 4 dirty files preserved.
home.tsx TimeFilter work already started: MenuV2.RadioGroup, luxon-based filtering. Missing i18n, debounce, fuzzysort. session.agent/model fields available for agent/model filtering.
No palette UI exists. showPalette() opens file dialog. ~50 commands across 11 categories. fuzzysort+useFilteredList available but not wired. Dirty key-hint-overlay.tsx is 250-line WIP.
No @general mention exists. AtOption needs 'delegate' discriminant. 10-step extension pattern documented. Composer controls are private to prompt-input.tsx. Zero test coverage for @mention system.
BLOCKER: dangling IPC channel get-desktop-plugin-config. PluginKind omits 'desktop'. Plugin provider/loader exists but no UI. 4 dirty files preserved. 3 shared files need produce_fragment.
Export/import is greenfield. dialog-fork.tsx is template. save-file-picker IPC ready. @zip.js/zip.js already used. No sanitization utility. Active Postgres migration affects session tables.
GitHub integration greenfield. parseGitHubRemote dead code. @octokit/rest unused. OAuth patterns exist. Review tab is PR entry point.
All 6 Phase 2 lanes complete. 6 commits pushed to dev (b98c0f79→aae417b4). Files changed across packages: app, desktop, opencode, sdk. All checkpoints published.
